tasks.label: Build Release
tasks.command: $msbuild = & 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; & $msbuild FlowX.sln /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutDir=${workspaceFolder}\Release\ /m

tasks.label: Clean
tasks.command: $msbuild = & 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; & $msbuild FlowX.sln /t:Clean /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x86 /m; & $msbuild FlowX.sln /t:Clean /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x86 /m

tasks.label: Deploy Debug
tasks.command: $es = Get-Process -Name 'EuroScope' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($es) { $es | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; Copy-Item '${workspaceFolder}\Debug\FlowX.dll' 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\FlowX.dll' -Force; Copy-Item '${workspaceFolder}\config.json' 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\config.json' -Force; Get-ChildItem '${workspaceFolder}\*.wav' | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\' -Force }; Write-Host 'Deploy Debug done.'

tasks.label: Deploy Release
tasks.command: Copy-Item '${workspaceFolder}\Release\FlowX.dll' 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\FlowX.dll' -Force; Copy-Item '${workspaceFolder}\config.json' 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\config.json' -Force; Get-ChildItem '${workspaceFolder}\*.wav' | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName 'D:\EuroScope\VACC-Austria\LOVV\Plugins\FlowX\' -Force }; Write-Host 'Deploy Release done.'

tasks.label: Build Debug
tasks.command: $msbuild = & 'C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe' -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find 'MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe' | Select-Object -First 1; & $msbuild FlowX.sln /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutDir=${workspaceFolder}\Debug\ /m
